hero.title: AI-Powered Knowledge
hero.subtitle: Centralize your documents, chat with AI, and search intelligently — all in one secure platform built for enterprise teams.
hero.mockQuestion: What are the side effects of this medication?
hero.mockAnswer: Based on the clinical guidelines, the common side effects include headache, nausea, and dizziness. Serious reactions are rare but include...
hero.inputPlaceholder: Ask anything about your knowledge base...

features.label: Capabilities
features.title: Everything You Need for AI Knowledge Management
features.subtitle: A comprehensive platform combining RAG-powered chat, document search, and enterprise security.

ragChat.title: RAG-Powered Chat
ragChat.desc: Chat with AI grounded in your organization's documents. Get accurate, citation-backed answers.

docSearch.title: Intelligent Document Search
docSearch.desc: Search across thousands of documents with AI-powered semantic understanding.

hipaa.title: HIPAA Compliant
hipaa.desc: Enterprise-grade security with full HIPAA compliance and data encryption.

multiTurn.title: Multi-Turn Conversations
multiTurn.desc: Maintain context across conversation turns for deeper, more meaningful interactions.

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base Management
knowledgeBase.desc: Upload, organize, and manage your document repositories with ease.

realtime.title: Real-Time Processing
realtime.desc: Instant document processing and indexing for up-to-date knowledge access.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.desc: Complete logging of all interactions for compliance and quality assurance.

roleAccess.title: Role-Based Access
roleAccess.desc: Granular access control with team-based permissions and user roles.

multilang.title: Multi-Language Support
multilang.desc: Support for English, Vietnamese, and Japanese with easy language switching.

useCases.label: Use Cases
useCases.title: Built for Enterprise Knowledge Needs
useCases.subtitle: From healthcare to compliance, our platform serves diverse organizational requirements.

clinical.title: Clinical Decision Support
clinical.desc: Instant access to clinical guidelines, drug interactions, and treatment protocols.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy Knowledge Base
pharmacy.desc: Quick lookup for drug information, dosing guidelines, and formulary management.

patient.title: Patient Education
patient.desc: Generate patient-friendly explanations from complex medical documentation.

training.title: Staff Training & Onboarding
training.desc: Accelerate training with AI-powered Q&A on organizational policies and procedures.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.desc: Stay compliant with instant access to regulatory documents and audit trails.

operations.title: Operational Efficiency
operations.desc: Streamline workflows with instant access to SOPs, guidelines, and best practices.

sdlcDocs.title: Healthcare SDLC Documentation
sdlcDocs.desc: Centralize IEC 62304, ISO 14971, and FDA guidance documents for fast developer reference during healthcare software projects.

medDeviceQms.title: Medical Device QMS
medDeviceQms.desc: AI-powered search across ISO 13485 quality management records, CAPAs, and design history files.

researchData.title: Clinical Research Knowledge
researchData.desc: Aggregate clinical trial data, research papers, and evidence summaries for data-driven healthcare development.

sdlc.label: Our Methodology
sdlc.title: Built with Enterprise SDLC Standards
sdlc.subtitle: We follow a rigorous software development lifecycle to ensure quality, security, and compliance.

discovery.title: Requirements Discovery
discovery.desc: Deep-dive into stakeholder needs, regulatory requirements, and technical constraints.

design.title: Architecture Design
design.desc: Design scalable, secure architecture with compliance-first approach.

develop.title: Agile Development
develop.desc: Iterative development with continuous integration and automated testing.

test.title: Quality Assurance
test.desc: Comprehensive testing including security audits, penetration testing, and compliance verification.

deploy.title: Secure Deployment
deploy.desc: Zero-downtime deployment with rollback capabilities and monitoring.

iterate.title: Continuous Improvement
iterate.desc: Regular feedback cycles, performance optimization, and feature enhancements.

compliance.title: Built for Healthcare Compliance
compliance.desc: Our platform is designed and validated against the most stringent healthcare and data security standards.

deployment.label: Deployment Options
deployment.title: Deploy Your Way
deployment.subtitle: Choose the deployment model that fits your organization's security and infrastructure requirements.

cloud.title: Cloud Hosted
cloud.desc: Fully managed cloud deployment with automatic updates and scaling.

hybrid.title: Hybrid Cloud
hybrid.desc: Keep sensitive data on-premise while leveraging cloud for compute.
features: Data stays in your data center

onPremise.title: On-Premise
onPremise.desc: Full control with deployment within your own infrastructure.

architecture.title: Enterprise-Grade Architecture
architecture.desc: Built on modern containerized infrastructure with support for major cloud providers and orchestration platforms.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Knowledge Management?
cta.subtitle: Join organizations worldwide who trust B-Knowledge for secure, AI-powered knowledge management.

footer.description: AI-powered knowledge management platform for enterprise teams. Secure, compliant, and intelligent.

stringTransform.delimitersHint: Comma-separated list of delimiters. Split uses all; merge uses the first.
stringTransform.splitRefHint: Variable reference to the string to split into an array
stringTransform.scriptHint: Use {variable} syntax or Jinja2 template expressions to combine variables

exitLoop.description: This node immediately breaks out of the enclosing Loop or Iteration when reached. No configuration is needed.
exitLoop.usage: Place this node inside a Loop or Iteration body. Connect it to a condition branch to exit early based on a rule.
